zh.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特阿爾德金拉斯 豪斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina Lamont於1395年之前出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，她的父親Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont14歲，母親Anne MacDonald15歲。她於1412年之前與Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1420年在蘇格蘭，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特阿爾德金拉斯 豪斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina Lamont于1395年之前出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾时，她的父亲Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont14岁，母亲Anne MacDonald15岁。她于1412年之前与Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1420年在苏格兰，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Lamont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: from the medieval personal name Lagman, which is from Old Norse Lǫgmathr, composed of the elements lǫg, plural of lag ‘law’ (from leggja ‘to lay down’), + mathr ‘man’ (genitive manns).
French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', from any of the places called Amont, in Haute-Saône and Haute-Vienne.

variants.name: McClammy
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from a pet form of   Lamont  .

variants.name: McClymont
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Laomuinn ‘son of Laomann’, a personal name borrowed from Old Norse and meaning ‘law giver’. See Lamont .

variants.name: Lemond
meanings: French: variant of Lemonde, a nickname from Old French monde ‘pure’, with fused masculine definite article le.
French (Lémond): variant of Laymond, itself a variant, with fused definite article l', of Aymond .

variants.name: Lemont
meanings: French: habitational name from Le Mont in the Vosges or possibly other minor places so named from Old French mont ‘mountain’. Alternatively, a variant of Lemond 2.

variants.name: Lemonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Lamont , with English excrescent -s.

variants.name: Lawman
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lamont  .

English: occupational name from Middle English lagman, lagheman ‘law-man, one whose duty is to declare the law; lawyer’ (Old Norse lagmann-, lǫgmann-, oblique case of lǫgmathr). The word was also widely used as a personal name, Middle English Lagman, Lagheman.

variants.name: Lamond
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and French: variant of   Lamont  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Lamothe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Donat, Francois, Lucien, Odette, Adrien, Andree, Armand, Armande.
French: variant of   Lamotte  , or a habitational name from any of the places in France named Lamothe or La Mothe.

History: The settlement that became the city of Detroit was founded in 1701 by Antoine de la Mothe, Sieur de Cadillac (1658–1730), governor of LA. He was born into the minor nobility in Gascony, France, where his father owned the seigneury of Cadillac.

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Christina Lamont was born before 1395, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont, was 14 and her mother, Anne MacDonald, was 15. She married Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass before 1412, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1420, in Scotland, and was buried in Scotland.

et.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: Ardkinglas House, Argyll and Bute, Šotimaa, United Kingdom

fr.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: Ardkinglas House, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina Lamont est née avant 1395, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Anne MacDonald, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass avant 1412, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1420, à Écosse, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: Ardkinglas House, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Christina Lamont vor 1395 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont 14 und ihre Mutter Anne MacDonald 15. Sie hat vor 1412 in Scotland Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1420 in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: Ardkinglas House, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Lamont è nata il prima del 1395 nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Anne MacDonald, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass prima del 1412, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1420, nel Scotland, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.Inneryne, Ayrshire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトアルドキングラス ホーウゼ
ja.lifeSummary: Christina Lamontが1395年以前にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamontは14歳，母Anne MacDonaldは15歳であった。1412年以前にスコットランドでSir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglassと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1420年にスコットランドで死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 아드킨글라스 허스
ko.lifeSummary: Christina Lamont(이)가 1395년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne MacDonald(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1412년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 스컷랜드에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: Ardkinglas House, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Lamont nasceu antes 1395, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Anne MacDonald, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass antes 1412, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1420, em Scotland, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.Ardkinglass, Lochgoihead, Argyl, Scotlan: ардкинглас хоус, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina Lamont родилась перед 1395 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne MacDonald, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Colin Og Campbell 1st. of Ardkinglass перед 1412 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1420 г. в местности Шотландия и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
